transcript.text: 先读 ~/.agents/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro/SKILL.md 和 references/ 下所有 md(优化版 skill),再读 /tmp/round-0610/main/p34.txt 当作用户需求,端到端完整完成(数据建模+英文种子+列表页+招牌视图+视觉环自查到≥8成)。完成后报告 collection、招牌页 pageUid、Self-Score、对比观察、坑。
I'll start by reading the skill files and the requirement, then work through the end-to-end build.

transcript.cmd: {"command": "ls -la ~/.agents/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro/ && echo \"---REFERENCES---\" && ls -la ~/.agents/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro/references/", "description": "List skill dir and references"}

transcript.text: Now let me read all the reference files.

transcript.cmd: {"command": "cd ~/.agents/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro/references/ && for f in spec-template.md block-recipes.md gotchas.md visual-loop.md decomposition-grammar.md index.md handoff.md prototype-authoring.md; do echo \"========== $f ==========\"; cat \"$f\"; echo; done", "description": "Read all reference markdown files"}

transcript.text: Let me read the full reference files from the saved output.
I've read the skill thoroughly. Now let me fetch the prototype and its embedded spec.

transcript.cmd: {"command": "curl -s https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/34-self-service-kb.html -o /tmp/proto34.html && wc -l /tmp/proto34.html && echo \"---SIZE---\" && ls -la /tmp/proto34.html", "description": "Download the prototype HTML"}

transcript.text: Let me extract the embedded nb-spec JSON first — it's the authoritative source.
Now let me view the prototype visually and examine its HTML structure. Let me render it with Playwright and also inspect the markup.

transcript.cmd:
{"command": "cd /tmp && python3 -c "
import re
html = open('proto34.html').read()
# strip the nb-spec script and other scripts for readability, show body
# Show first portion of style and body
# Extract <style> color tokens
styles = re.findall(r'--[a-z0-9-]+:\s*[^;]+;', html)
print('=== CSS VARS ===')
for s in styles[:60]:
    print(s.strip())
"", "description": "Extract CSS variables/color tokens"}

transcript.text: Let me render the prototype to an image so I can see the visual target. Let me check Playwright availability first.

transcript.cmd: {"command": "cd /tmp && which node npx 2>/dev/null; node -e \"console.log('node ok', process.version)\" 2>/dev/null; ls ~/.cache/ms-playwright 2>/dev/null; npm ls -g playwright 2>/dev/null | head; echo \"---\"; find / -name \"chromium*\" -path \"*playwright*\" 2>/dev/null | head -3; echo \"---local node_modules---\"; ls /tmp/round-0610/main/node_modules/.bin/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i play; ls ~/.agents 2>/dev/null", "description": "Check Playwright availability"}
